task_payload.task_name: Share Summary And Calibration Starter Assets
task_payload.business_value: Makes the professional diagnosis layer repeatable and shareable without drifting into direct homework answers.
task_payload.goal: Update tutor-friendly share output and add starter calibration assets for stable diagnosis behavior.
entry_criteria: Read docs/需求文档_1.2_最终版.md sections 5 and 6 before coding.
acceptance_criteria: Share payload includes tutor-friendly diagnosis, evidence, plan, caution, and do-not-overreact summary fields.
Starter calibration assets include >=10 gold samples, taxonomy handbook, diagnosis aggregation rules, and 7-Day Plan rule templates.
Assets preserve parent-first framing and prohibit direct homework-answer output.
constraints: Do not create a full tutor account product or large-scale review operations UI.
related_files: docs/requirements/saas-starter 一天落地实施说明.md
primary_files: docs/requirements/saas-starter 一天落地实施说明.md

normal: Fetch a share link and verify tutor-friendly diagnosis fields are present.
Verify calibration docs/fixtures include the starter required set.
exception: Confirm share output does not provide direct homework answers or overclaim weak evidence.

story_inputs: Read docs/需求文档_1.2_最终版.md sections 5 and 6 before coding.
In-scope files: app/share/[token]/*, app/api/share/[token]/route.ts, lib/reports/*, docs/requirements/*
story_process: Inspect the declared scope and understand the current implementation before editing.
Implement only the change required for this story goal and keep the blast radius within the card.
Run story-specific validation and record reusable evidence for acceptance.
story_outputs: Updated story artifacts in: app/share/[token]/*, app/api/share/[token]/route.ts, lib/reports/*, docs/requirements/*
Validation evidence and delivery artifacts archived for this story.
verification_basis: Share payload includes tutor-friendly diagnosis, evidence, plan, caution, and do-not-overreact summary fields.
Starter calibration assets include >=10 gold samples, taxonomy handbook, diagnosis aggregation rules, and 7-Day Plan rule templates.
Assets preserve parent-first framing and prohibit direct homework-answer output.

intentional_deviations: Telemetry and upgrade endpoints remain disabled by default in local agentsystem runs.
Claude-host-specific preambles are mirrored into local standards and adapters rather than executed verbatim.
